0.text:
We have received and staked our first half sol ever! Thank you everyone for checking out
our first campaign on our first day of going live. Happy Sunday to All. Can't wait until we complete our first goal.

Care Market is live on Solana mainnet! Our first campaign 'Feed a Child' is now accepting donations. Stake your SOL to fund meals for children in need — you get your SOL back when the goal is reached.
